bear.narrative: revenue miss, slower margin path, accelerated dilution, comp multiples compress to PINS-band

base.narrative: consensus revenue, trailing 3y CAGR extends, linear margin convergence to ad-platform mid-range, historical dilution persists

bull.narrative: revenue beat, operating leverage extends runway, IPO grant cliff exits dilution schedule, comp multiples expand above META

sensitivity.note: Exit multiple dominates — ±1.0x moves base IV by ±14.5% (vs ±9% for dilution ±200 bps, ±5% for WACC ±100 bps, ±0.6% for terminal margin ±300 bps); margin matters less because exit anchors on revenue not FCF

model.caveat: RDDT already inflected to positive FCF in FY2024; pre-profit variant invoked via --pre-profit override because thin profitable history (2y) does not support stable Gordon-growth terminal — exit-multiple framing remains honest, but FCF inflection year is degenerate (Y1 for all scenarios).

signal.qualitative_note: Transition year (FY2025 second full profitable year, FCF margin 31.1%); PEG 1.11 (clean fwd P/E 32.1 / derived 5y g 29.0%) supports WATCH. AI layer N/A — UGC platform monetised via ads, not AI thesis.
signal.condition: Confirm 2nd profitable year before running Model — earnings history too short for reliable Gordon-growth terminal; pre-profit variant (--pre-profit) recommended over standard DCF.

quality_signals.piotroski_note: Canonical Piotroski F-Score not computable from current yf MCP get_financials surface (missing total_assets, current_assets/liabilities, long-term debt split, gross_profit, operating_cash_flow, historical share counts). See ABA-70.

magic_formula.roic_note: ROIC not computable from current yf MCP surface (canonical denominator requires total_assets, current_assets/liabilities, intangibles). See ABA-70.

screen.rationale: Transition-year inflection — all 9 Q-signals true (first profitable year, SBC intensity collapsed 62%->16% of revenue as one-time IPO awards rolled off) but Magic Formula WATCH (EY 1.56%, rank 5 of 5 — operating income still small relative to EV; ROIC N/A — MCP-constrained per ABA-70). Quality ratio 1.0 >= 75% but MF=WATCH caps verdict at WATCH; ESTABLISHED classification by P/E 43.7.
